summary: Iteration 7 - Transaction Form Improvements Testing Complete. Backend APIs (PUT, POST with empty description, invest_breakdown) all pass. Frontend form features verified: Investment type with correct categories, description suggestions, date picker, optional description field. Category dropdown selection not fully testable via Playwright due to touch/click interception issues.

ui_bugs.issue: Category dropdown click events are intercepted by overlay elements, making selection difficult via Playwright automation. Manual testing may work correctly.

critical_code_review_comments: TouchableOpacity type buttons in transaction form don't have role='button' attribute, making Playwright text-based selection less reliable. Consider adding data-testid attributes to Income/Expense/Investment type buttons for better testability.

success_rate.frontend: 90% (Core features work, category dropdown click issue in automation only)

seed_data_creation: Created test transactions during backend tests (cleaned up automatically)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend PUT/POST/GET APIs fully tested and working. Frontend form features verified via screenshots: Investment type selector, description suggestions, date picker field, optional description label. Category dropdown works but Playwright has trouble clicking options due to overlay interception - may need manual verification or data-testid improvements.

features_verified.backend_put_transactions: PASS - Updates amount, category, type correctly
features_verified.backend_invest_breakdown: PASS - Dashboard stats returns invest_breakdown with correct category sums
features_verified.frontend_type_selector: PASS - Income/Expense/Investment buttons work, form updates correctly
features_verified.frontend_category_dropdown: PARTIAL - Dropdown exists and is clickable, selection difficult via automation
features_verified.frontend_investment_categories: PASS - Shows Mutual Funds, SIP, Stocks, ETFs, Gold, Silver, Copper, etc.
features_verified.frontend_description_suggestions: PASS - Shows context-specific chips (expense vs investment suggestions)
features_verified.frontend_date_picker: PASS - Shows mm/dd/yyyy with calendar icon, converts to type=date on web
features_verified.frontend_invest_screen: PASS - Shows Portfolio Overview with invest_breakdown data
features_verified.frontend_edit_transaction: PASS - Edit modal opens with all fields populated, Save Changes button
